scenes.prompt: A glowing AI brain floating in dark space, neural connections pulsating blue [Slow zoom in], cinematic lighting, 4K quality
Futuristic data center with rows of servers, holographic interfaces floating in air, blue and purple ambient lighting [Pan right slowly]
Digital code streams flowing like waterfall, green matrix-style characters, abstract visualization of AI algorithms processing data [Slow tilt down]
Same glowing AI brain from intro, now pulsing with golden light, camera slowly pulling back revealing vast network of connected nodes [Slow zoom out]
